evals.expected_output: An updated wiki/bookmarks/homepage.base file with the multi-view layout (cards-by-category default, all-bookmarks table, featured-category views) reflecting the current bookmark collection.

evals.prompt: Generate the bookmark dashboard with a static markdown export.
evals.expected_output: Both .base file (updated/created) AND a static wiki/bookmarks/homepage.md with category-grouped multi-column tables.

evals.prompt: Update the bookmark home page — only show work bookmarks.
evals.expected_output: Filtered homepage layout limited to category=work (or tags=work) bookmarks.
